#---------------------
# SAXPY INTEGER
#---------------------
VINST=00000001000000000111111111010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=00000000000011111110000000000111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=00000000000011111110000010000111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=16

VINST=00000010000000001000000101010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=00000010000000001000000101010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=00000000000011111110000100100111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=32

# END OF TEST
